branding.heroH1: Welcome back. Your prices are 50% off — every single product, every order.
branding.heroSub: Free shipping. $20 gift card every month. Exclusive access to your store.

merchandising_notes._comment: $20 monthly gift card and 'exclusive discounts' are merchandising copy. The 50% pricing IS the exclusive discount. Gift card distribution is wired by the owner's CRM, not this site.
